text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the entity covered by ADA Title II (state/local gov or contractor)?

example.trace: covered=true → size=120000 → track-2026 → audit + exceptions + remediation by Apr 24, 2026

text.example: Concrete walk: City of Faion (population 120k) is covered; track-2026; inventory shows 8 service areas; audit + exceptions + remediation plan ready by deadline.
